assignments.description: Assignment to get Picklist Choice Set IDs
assignments.name: Assign_Picklist_Choices
assignments.label: Assign Picklist Choices

decisions.description: Check for Sales Org and Sales Type to setup Shipping Terms
decisions.name: Check_for_Sales_Org_and_Sales_Type_to_setup_Shipping_Terms
decisions.label: Check for Sales Org and Sales Type to setup Shipping Terms

decisions.name: CHK_Running_User_vs_Opp_Owner
decisions.label: CHK Running User vs Opp Owner

Flow.description: Added a check for Opp Owner vs Running User SC-389 Expiration Date may be populated manually only for Quotes related to Tender Opportunities. For others is automatically populated in Quote TRG Init Expiration Date record trigger flow.

dynamicChoiceSets.description: Created by PWC as part of SC-496.
dynamicChoiceSets.name: CompanyIndustryPicklistChoiceSet

dynamicChoiceSets.description: Created by PWC as part of SC-496.
dynamicChoiceSets.name: ProductApplicationPicklistChoiceSet

Flow.interviewLabel: Opportunity SCR Create New CPQ Quote {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Opportunity SCR Create New CPQ Quote

recordUpdates.description: Update the Shipping Terms to DDP
recordUpdates.name: Update_the_Shipping_Terms_to_DDP
recordUpdates.label: Update the Shipping Terms to DDP

fields.name: DisplayError
fields.fieldText: You cannot create a quote for this opportunity as you are not the opportunity owner.

fields.name: Fault_Message
fields.fieldText:
We’re sorry — an unexpected error occurred and we couldn’t complete this step. 

Please contact your system administrator and provide the error message below:

{!$Flow.FaultMessage}

textTemplates.name: txtGetBillToContacts
textTemplates.text: Select Id, Name, BD_Contact_Name_Label__c FROM Contact WHERE AccountId = '{!Get_Opportunity.AccountId}' AND PKI_SAP_Contact_ID__c != NULL ORDER BY BD_Contact_Name_Label__c ASC

textTemplates.name: txtGetShipToContact
textTemplates.text: Select ID, Name, BD_Contact_Name_Label__c FROM Contact WHERE AccountId = '{!Account_ShipTo.recordId}' AND PKI_SAP_Contact_ID__c != NULL ORDER BY BD_Contact_Name_Label__c ASC
